description: Swift Brane native tool registry — ADR-002 envelope shim + host function interface

agents.name: swift-brane-agent
agents.description: Envelope shim + host function provider. Receives ADR-002 envelopes, validates via wasm64 tool export, performs I/O via host functions, returns envelope.

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: wasm64 file_read tool — validates UTF-8 paths (pure, no I/O). I/O provided by host functions per L010.
